description_long: This is a large, blocky hammer with a rectangular, metallic head featuring a dark, slightly textured surface and a subtle engraved pattern on its side. The head is robust and solid, with beveled edges and a circular marking on the top face. The handle is cylindrical, medium-length, and appears to be wrapped in a dark, grippy material with lighter, spiral accents for enhanced grip. At the end of the handle, there is a looped strap, likely made of leather or synthetic material, for securing the hammer to the user's wrist. The overall design is reminiscent of a ceremonial or fantasy hammer, with a sturdy build suitable for heavy-duty tasks. The hammer's finish is matte with a slight sheen, and no visible signs of wear or branding are present.
description: A large, rectangular-headed hammer with a dark, engraved metallic head and a textured, spiral-accented handle ending in a looped strap. The design is robust and slightly ornate, with a matte finish.
description_view_0: The hammer is shown at an angle, highlighting the engraved pattern on the side of the head and the spiral accents on the handle.
description_view_1: A direct end-on view of the hammer, showing the circular marking on the top face of the head and the narrow profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0 but from the opposite side, displaying the other face of the head and the full length of the handle with its looped strap.
description_view_3: A straight-on view of the hammer's face, emphasizing the rectangular shape of the head and the alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle wrapped in a dark, textured material with spiral grip accents and a looped strap at the end.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head with beveled edges, a flat striking face, and an engraved pattern on the side.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: Looped strap at the end of the handle
